issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases in the examples.

scenarios.name: Workers API with CORS, JWT, and RPC client
scenarios.rationale: Baseline hand-rolls CORS/JWT middleware and uses plain fetch on the client, missing built-ins; treatment imports hono/cors, hono/jwt, and logger, reads c.get('jwtPayload'), exports AppType = typeof routes, and consumes with hc<AppType> from hono/client.

scenarios.name: JSX HTML response + streamText endpoint
scenarios.rationale: Baseline returns a raw HTML string and a hand-rolled ReadableStream; treatment uses c.html(<jsx/>) and c.streamText with stream.write/stream.sleep exactly as the skill documents.
